---
title: "Section 6: Computational and Analytical Learning"
id: "mod001-se01-sec06"
section_id: "mod001-se01-sec06"
session_id: "mod001-se01"
toc: false
---




### In this section
<br>

- [Methods Variant (Code)](mod001-se01-sec06-sp04.qmd)

- [Text Variant (Math)](mod001-se01-sec06-sp06.qmd)

```{=html}
<div class="custom-page-navigation">
    <div class="nav-prev">

        </a>
        
    </div>

            <span class="nav-label">Next →</span>
            <span class="nav-title">Methods Variant (Code)</span>
        </a>
        
    </div>
</div>
```

<!-- END_NAVIGATION -->
